curation_notes: Patch commit 75cca53 replaces g.rand.Read() with io.ReadFull(g.rand, ...) in three functions within generator.go: NewV4, getClockSequence, and getHardwareAddr. The bare Read call could return fewer bytes than requested without error, leaving parts of the UUID buffer zero-filled and making UUIDs predictable. No sibling files contain the same pattern — only generator.go performs random reads. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-338) is correct.
